user.title: MyOpel file folder

imap.title: Auto-download via email (optional)
imap.description:
Configure an IMAP email account to automatically download attached .myop files.
Leave the server empty to skip and upload files manually.

data.imap_server: IMAP server (e.g. imap.gmail.com) — leave empty to skip

error.not_a_directory: The path does not point to a folder.
error.invalid_json: The file found is not valid JSON.
error.invalid_format: The file found is not a valid MyOpel export.
error.imap_cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the IMAP server. Check server and port.
error.imap_auth_failed: Invalid IMAP credentials. Check email and password.

data.file_path: Folder path (leave empty to keep current)
data.min_trip_distance_enabled: Ignore short trips as last trip
data.time_offset: Timestamp UTC offset correction (hours, e.g. 1=CET winter, 2=CEST summer)
